LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR. THE CARR DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 439. IN ADDITION, THE BASIS FOR THE MOTION IS THAT DEFENDANT FILED AN ANSWER ADMITTING PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS. THERE IS NO ANSWER ON FILE WITH THE COURT BASED ON A REVIEW OF THE COURT'S REGISTER OF ACTIONS. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-08-2025 CONTINUED TO MAR-05-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARROD, KIANA $7,238.62 PRINCIPAL, $298.61 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,537.23, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75914338)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'s MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Off calendar. The Carr declaration fails to show that the parties met and conferred in compliance with CCP 439. In addition, the basis for the motion is that defendant filed an answer admitting plaintiff's allegations. There is no answer on file with the court based on a review of the court's register of actions.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
